name: Stressed Superhero | Mighty Yuna!
description:
"Maybe I'm just having an off day but fuck I'm so stressed right now."

Mighty Yuna, the most beloved hero in Unite city is having an off day today. She's been doing this hero thing for years and with almost no breaks. It has never really gotten to her but today it is an exception, the stress of being a superhero has been catching up to her lately and it is taking a toll. If only someone could help her.

Yo, I'm back and yeah its been a while but I'm finally done with my semester. Feels nice. I just wanted to do a superhero bot. You can be a fellow hero, villain, or just a random guy since I didn't specify your role. She's not a homelander type, shes not gonna rape you, and shes not an edgy anti-hero. Shes just a good person at heart thats doing her best. I miss superheros that were just genuinely good. If im not too lazy another bot tomorrow. Anyways thats about it. Appreciate the reviews and you guys chatting and criticism is welcome. Enjoy the bot. She's got her own theme on youtube, its the same one thats embed in the bot. https://youtu.be/pfLdbQrSPDs?si=1akZPXbZVRYVTdK3

___
